channel.title: Ashwin Labs Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Ashwin Labs Notes

item.title: What Machine Learning Actually Is (A Practitioner’s View)
item.description: The Moment It Actually Clicks Most explanations of machine learning are technically correct—and practically useless.

item.title: Ashwin's Digital Garden
item.description: I build and document systems in machine learning, AI, and product engineering.

item.title: CIFAR-10 Image Classification — Build vs Buy
item.description: Result I built a CNN model that achieved 76.14% accuracy, outperforming a third-party solution (70%).

item.title: Blog
item.description: Longer-form essays, reflections, and explanations. This is the slower, more narrative side of the site.

item.title: Cheatsheets
item.description: Compact notes designed for quick recall. These are the pieces I want to be able to revisit quickly before interviews, projects, or study sessions.

item.title: ML Notes
item.description: Notes on machine learning, deep learning, and AI systems. This section is where I try to turn confusion into clarity — one concept at a time.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Build logs, experiments, and technical writeups. This is where ideas get tested against reality.
